texto: But weren't done, not by a long shot. his great hands lifted me under my ass and my thighs, urging me to get on the table and lie on my side. His arm hooked under my leg right under the kneecap, and now everyone had a spectacular view of my dripping for him.
explicacao: Citação de Lisa Lawrence sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “But weren't done, not by a long shot. his great hands lifted me under my ass and my thighs, urgin…” articula reflexao, erotica, under em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
